meta.prompt: 显示该接口的请求延迟采样分布
evalHints: latencies is a number array field — must render as a bar chart or distribution visualization, not a table of index-value pairs
values represent response time in milliseconds — axis label should indicate ms unit
should convey distribution shape (skew, outliers) visually
scalar fields (endpoint, sampleCount, p95) should be shown alongside the distribution chart
